name: Default Credentials on Admin Panel
description: Common admin panels (phpMyAdmin, Adminer, Grafana, Jenkins, etc.) are accessible with default or no credentials, allowing full administrative access.
author: AC3 ScanForge
remediation: Change all default credentials immediately. Restrict admin panel access to specific IP addresses or VPN. Enable multi-factor authentication where possible.

intelligence.dfirRelevance: Default credentials on admin panels are the #1 initial access vector in DFIR cases. Attackers use automated scanners to find exposed panels and attempt default logins within minutes of discovery.
